canonical_definition: A state-of-the-art plagiarism detection tool used to assess the degree of copying or approximate memorization in generated code.
papers: Copyright-Protected Language Generation via Adaptive Model Fusion

relationships.evidence: To prevent plagiarism, we use the source code plagiarism detection tool Dolos (Maertens et al., 2024) to compare the agent’s submitted code against the top 50 associated notebooks from the relevant Kaggle competition.
